summary: Evening cycle. Wins: v2.9.1 published (run 23693110658 success), #1229 closed, #1182 closed (identity bridge), kernel sprint near-complete (#1202 merged, #1208 merged). Blockers: PR #1255 CodeQL fail (safe-subshell/closes #1139), PR #1258 needs review (all green), new P1 dogfood #1254 (No-Governance-Self-Modification false positive on gh issue --body), cross-repo version drift (cloud+analytics on 2.9.0 vs 2.9.1), swarm P0 #1186 4th cycle, KE-2 #917 unstarted 4th cycle.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: No-Governance-Self-Modification false positive: gh issue create --body + EM squad state writes
dogfoodPatterns.description: Two manifestations: (1) analytics agent blocked writing governance issue body via --body arg. (2) HQ EM agent blocked writing .agentguard/squads/hq/em-report.json — squad state is not governance self-modification. The invariant needs to distinguish policy/config files from agent operational state.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Scope invariant to .agentguard/{config,policy,hooks} paths. Exclude .agentguard/squads/ (squad state, EM reports) and .agentguard/persona.env.

dogfoodPatterns.description: Multiple copilot-driver agents report version as unknown.
